ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "author_activity" TEXT /* Activity status of the author */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the author's last update */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile picture */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the author joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the author's last login */,
  "website" TEXT /* The author's personal website or blog */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "total_stories" INTEGER /* The total number of stories the author has published */,
  "total_words" INTEGER /* The total word count of all the author's published stories */,
  "total_followers" INTEGER /* The total number of followers the author has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chapters" (
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story the chapter belongs to */,
  "chapter_number" INTEGER /* Chapter number in the story */,
  "chapter_title" TEXT /* Title of the chapter */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the chapter */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the chapter */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the chapter */,
  "content" TEXT /* The actual content of the chapter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the chapter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the chapter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story the relationship belongs to */,
  "relationship_details" TEXT /* Details of the relationship (e.g., character pairings) */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* The type of relationship */,
  "is_canonical" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the relationship is canonical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story the character belongs to */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the character */,
  "is_original" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the character is original or from existing media */,
  "first_appearance" TEXT /* The first chapter or story where the character appears */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* The type of tag */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the tag is custom or predefined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the story */,
  "rating_value" TEXT /* Value of the rating */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Optional text review accompanying the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the story being interacted with */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, comment, kudos) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "device" TEXT /* The device used for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the user during the activity */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the activity was performed anonymously */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment for nested comments */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the comment was made anonymously */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the comment has been flagged for review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story being bookmarked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the bookmark */,
  "bookmark_date" TEXT /* Date the bookmark was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the bookmark is public or private */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the bookmark was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hits" (
  "hit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hit record */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story that received a hit */,
  "hit_date" TEXT /* Date when the hit was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user who hit the story */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent of the user who hit the story */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the hit was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story associated with the warning */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of warning (e.g., explicit content) */,
  "warning_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the warning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the warning was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story that belongs to the series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "series_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the series */,
  "series_status" TEXT /* The current status of the series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the series was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the series was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)
